chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 5826 of 2019 _________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 25764/19. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.10.2024. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ********* None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing and the following order was passed:- “None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Matter is pending since 2019, whereas, learned Counsel for the department submits that an order-in-original has already been passed against the Petitioner and was sent electronically but despite this, instant Petition has been filed on the ground that no order-in-original has been issued. Since nobody is in attendance, as a last and final chance, matter is adjourned with a note of caution that if no one turns up to assist, appropriate orders will be passed. To come up on 18.10.2024. Interim order passed earlier to continue till next date of hearing.” Today, again nobody is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner, which reflects that they are not interested to proceed with this matter. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
